ruleset_used.description: Name of the ruleset used for analysis
ruleset_used.title: Ruleset Used

llm_validation_enabled.description: Whether LLM validation was enabled for this analysis
llm_validation_enabled.title: Llm Validation Enabled

analysis_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the analysis was performed
analysis_timestamp.title: Analysis Timestamp

evidence_context_size.description: Size of context used for evidence extraction
evidence_context_size.title: Evidence Context Size

SecurityDocumentContextMetadata.description:
Metadata for security document context items.

Extends BaseFindingMetadata which provides:
- source: str - Source file path (same as filename)
- context: dict[str, object] - Extensible context for pipeline metadata

source.description: Source file or location where the data was found
source.title: Source

context.description: Extensible context for pipeline metadata (connector_type, artifact_id, etc.)
context.title: Context

SecurityDocumentContextMetadata.title: SecurityDocumentContextMetadata

SecurityDocumentContextModel.description:
Individual document context item.

Carries the full document content and its classified security domains
for downstream assessors. This is NOT a compliance finding — it is a
document context carrier. It satisfies the Finding protocol (id + metadata)
for LLMService.complete() compatibility.

An empty security_domains list means the document is cross-cutting and
flows to every assessor instance regardless of domain filter.

id.description: Unique identifier for this document context item (UUID)
id.title: Id

filename.description: Relative path within the policy documents directory
filename.title: Filename

content.description: Full document text, preserved for audit and traceability
content.title: Content

summary.description: Compliance-focused summary preserving key controls, procedures, responsibilities, and requirements. Used by downstream assessors instead of full content to stay within context window limits.
summary.title: Summary

security_domains.description: Security domains this document addresses. Empty list = cross-cutting (flows to all assessors)
security_domains.title: Security Domains

SecurityDocumentContextModel.title: SecurityDocumentContextModel

SecurityDocumentContextSummary.description: Summary statistics for security document context extraction.

domain_coverage.description: Distinct security domains across all documents
domain_coverage.title: Domain Coverage

SecurityDocumentContextSummary.title: SecurityDocumentContextSummary

SecurityDomain.description:
Framework-agnostic security domain taxonomy.

Bridges indicator findings to compliance framework controls
(ISO 27001 Annex A, GDPR Art 32, etc.). Shared across all producers
and consumers of security evidence — rulesets, normalisers, assessors.

StrEnum serialises to plain strings in JSON — Pydantic handles this
transparently, so no custom serialiser is needed.
SecurityDomain.title: SecurityDomain

description:
Complete output structure for security_document_context schema.

Represents the full wire format for security document context results.
These context items feed into ISO27001Assessor instances, which receive
documents filtered by security domain.

findings.description: List of classified document context items
findings.title: Findings

summary.description: Summary statistics of the document classification

title: SecurityDocumentContextOutput
